digest.title_en: I Made Claude Code Think Before It Codes. Then I Gave It a Team.
digest.title_pt: I Made Claude Code Think Before It Codes. Then I Gave It a Team.
digest.body_en:
Last year I gave Claude Code a process so it would think before it codes. This year I gave it a team: an issue-maintainer that turns ideas into tickets, an orchestrator that writes no code, specialist subagents that build in parallel, and a review gate that drives a cohort of pull requests to merge-ready at once. My job went from writing code to conducting.

Tags: `claude`, `ai`, `productivity`, `devops` ôñ Author: **_vjk**

Community buzz: **2** points, **1** comments, via **Devto**. Check the original source below for the full story.
digest.body_pt:
Last year I gave Claude Code a process so it would think before it codes. This year I gave it a team: an issue-maintainer that turns ideas into tickets, an orchestrator that writes no code, specialist subagents that build in parallel, and a review gate that drives a cohort of pull requests to merge-ready at once. My job went from writing code to conducting.

Tags: `claude`, `ai`, `productivity`, `devops` ôñ Autor: **_vjk**

RepercussûÈo: **2** pontos, **1** comentûÀrios, via **Devto**. Confira a fonte original abaixo para a matûˋria completa.
